name: Suspicious Process Discovery With Get-Process
notes:
This rule detects adversaries performing discovery to get the processes that are running on the local computer.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Process Discovery With Get-Process
SIGMA Description: Get the processes that are running on the local computer.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success
when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of Get-Process
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Process Discovery With Get-Process on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success
AND when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of Get-Process
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Process Discovery With Get-Process
Event description: Detects adversaries performing discovery to get the processes that are running on the local computer.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
